title: cyrtomium caducum
intro: Cyrtomium caducum, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its deciduous fronds that turn yellow in autumn. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cyrtomium caducum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and potentially lowering blood pressure due to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. Cyrtomium caducum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
